description_long: This copy shop or print shop is a multi-story commercial building with a striking modern design, featuring a geometric facade with bold black, white, and gray patterns. Large blue-tinted glass windows dominate the front and side elevations, allowing ample natural light into the interior and providing visibility from the street. The structure has a boxy, angular form with sharp lines and a flat roof, and includes architectural elements such as cantilevered sections and a prominent overhang above the main entrance. The ground floor appears to have a recessed entryway, possibly with a small awning or canopy, and the upper floors are set back slightly, creating a layered effect. The building's exterior is primarily composed of glass and metal panels, with some areas of exposed concrete or composite cladding. No visible signage, posters, or printing equipment can be seen from the outside, and the windows are clear of any displays or decorations.
description: A modern, multi-story copy shop with bold geometric patterns, large blue-tinted windows, and a sleek, angular facade. The building features a flat roof, prominent overhangs, and a visually striking black, white, and gray exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing large blue-tinted windows, geometric black and white facade, and a recessed entryway on the left side.
description_view_1: Rear view with minimal detailing, mostly solid black surfaces and limited window openings.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the angular, geometric patterns and a mix of glass and solid panels.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with expansive blue-tinted windows and a prominent overhang above the main entrance.
attribute_architectural_style: modern; characterized by geometric patterns, large glass windows, flat roof, and a sleek, angular facade with bold color contrasts.
